spire2stats / events / this or that?

Averages per event visit

Avg Damage
2.0

0.0
Max HP Change
+0.2
Unknown Act • Shared
Arms suddenly jut out from a nearby hole, clutching a suspicious bag of riches and a clearly cursed relic.

“This... or That?”
a scratched-up voice whispers from below.

Choices & Outcomes

This
Lose 6 HP. Gain 41-68 Gold.
That
Add Clumsy to your Deck. Obtain a random Relic.
